subject: [PATCH v4 10/21] swap: move swap cache to virtual swap descriptor

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch moves the swap cache and workingset shadow for anonymous pages to the virtual swap descriptor, effectively range-partitioning the swap cache by virtual swap clusters of PMD size. This change eliminates lock contention in the swap cache. The patch updates several kernel files, including huge_memory.c, migrate.c, shmem.c, and vmscan.c, to use the new swap cache locking mechanism. The approach taken is to associate each swap entry with its corresponding virtual swap descriptor, allowing for more efficient and concurrent access to the swap cache.
